title: Dadu No.1
desc: A rich businessman tries to play the matchmaker between his employee and grandson.

title: Indrajit
desc: An MLA kidnaps Indrajit's son after he punishes Raja for raping a girl.

title: Fighter, Marbo Noy Morbo
desc: A college student sets out to avenge the death of his elder brother by a local gangster.

title: Sejo Bou
desc: Ayan falls in love with a rich girl but her father disapproves of their relationship.

title: Sathi
desc: Two friends and street singers, Bhulwa and Manju, hope to make it big in the stage world.

title: Troyee
desc: The lives of three best friends change when two of them fall in love with the same girl.

title: Ami Achhi Sei Je Tomar
desc: After Bhaskar's death, Angshuman tries to woo Priya, hiding a secret about his identity.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Parvati decides to sacrifice her love against her will for her parents' contentment. S01 E106.

title: Prem Korechi Besh Korechi
desc: Rana is extra protective of his sister Hasi, which is why he cannot accept her lover.

title: Pronami Tomay
desc: A couple's dreams of a life together are crushed when one of them marries someone else.

title: Rakhe Hari Mare Ke
desc: After being jailed an honest man learns about his twin brother who is an humble policeman.

title: Tulkalam
desc: Honest, hard-working villagers fight against the forces of industrialisation.

title: Naga Panchami
desc: A shape-shifting snake is determined to avenge her mother's untimely death.

title: Premer Kahini
desc: At a wedding, a man gets a shock when the bride turns out to be a girl he loves.

title: Kencho Khunrte Keute
desc: Parama is disciplined by a will requiring her to marry for full inheritance.

title: Titli
desc: Young Titli meets Bollywood superstar Rohit Roy on her way to the airport. Later, her dreams were shattered.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fulfil their duties together while sacrificing and caring for humanity.

title: Ei Prithibi Tomar Aamar
desc: Sibu, a hawker, saves Purnima from goons and helps her escape to an ashram to evade danger.

title: Jhinuk Mala
desc: Sujan and Sakhi are madly in love with each other and want to spend their lives together. But Sakhi's vicious stepmother has other plans for them.
